title: A field should not duplicate the name of its containing class
description: A field should not have the same name as its containing class.
recommendation: Rename the field to avoid duplicating the class name

noncompliant.description: Class MyClass has a field MyClass

compliant.description: Class MyClass has a field another_field

why_is_this_an_issue: Duplicating class and field names can lead to confusion and errors when reading or maintaining the code.
how_to_fix: Rename the field to a different name.
